creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
5.10 does work on FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT however <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/krita/#packages> it's not yet packaged in quarterly for any ABI. 

Since FreeBSD 13.0 is very recently end of life, would you like to try with 13.1-RELEASE-p2?

Update the OS, then upgrade packages. 

Thanks
